tasks.instruction: As a new client focused on anxiety, book a weekday evening (5:00 PM or later) 50-minute individual intake within the next 14 days with the lowest-priced therapist whose standard 50-minute individual rate is under $180, using sample contact details (name Alex Miller, email alex.miller@example.com, phone 555-123-7890 and reason "Anxiety and stress").

tasks.instruction: While logged in as an adult client, complete the pre-session intake questionnaire for adult clients by entering the given demographic details (DOB 01/15/1990, gender Female, occupation Software Engineer), selecting exactly three presenting concerns (Anxiety, Sleep problems, Difficulty concentrating), and setting anxiety, depression, and stress ratings to 7, 3, and 8 before submitting.
